design: Prospective falsification of the replicated late transition. Anchor and physical paraphrase retain the same scientific answer but receive different arbitrary output codes; anchor and physical counterfactual have opposite scientific answers but share code A. A checkpoint marker precedes the mapping, so its state cannot encode the future arbitrary assignment.
